name: codex-coordinator
description: Keep parallel Codex tasks inside clear repository boundaries with a small local active-claim board.

interface.shortDescription: Keep parallel Codex tasks from crossing wires
interface.longDescription: Add a small, repository-scoped task-boundary board to native Codex tasks. Each active writer publishes only its bounded goal, paths, and exclusive actions so planned overlap is visible without a resident coordinator, heartbeat, transcript mirror, or required pull-request workflow.
defaultPrompt: Show the active task boundaries in this repository
Claim this task's bounded paths before making changes
Check whether the installed Coordinator package is compatible
